query:
INSERT INTO modifier_template_options (template_id, name, price, is_default, sort_order) VALUES 
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Fillings' LIMIT 1), 'Lettuce', '0.90', false, 0),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Fillings' LIMIT 1), 'Red Onion', '0.90', false, 1),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Fillings' LIMIT 1), 'White Onion', '0.90', false, 2),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Fillings' LIMIT 1), 'Cheese', '0.90', false, 3),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Fillings' LIMIT 1), 'Coleslaw', '0.90', false, 4),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Fillings' LIMIT 1), 'Cucumber', '0.90', false, 5),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Fillings' LIMIT 1), 'Jalapeño', '0.90', false, 6),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Fillings' LIMIT 1), 'Mixed Peppers', '0.90', false, 7),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Fillings' LIMIT 1), 'Egg Mayonnaise', '0.90', false, 8),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Fillings' LIMIT 1), 'Bacon', '0.90', false, 9),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Fillings' LIMIT 1), 'Spinach', '0.90', false, 10),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Fillings' LIMIT 1), 'Sweetcorn', '0.90', false, 11);
